_comment: Declarative task -> model routing for the single-node POC. NO learned classifier (see README + broke ADR-016). 'task_capability' maps a task category to a required mlx-knife capability (deterministic). 'defaults' is your remembered preferred model per category -- edit these to names from your own `mlxk list`. If a default is missing or not runtime_compatible, route.py falls back to the first runnable capability-matching model.
